cases.input: We are a mid-size financial services company with 2,000 employees wanting to build a new client portal on Azure. We have M365 E3 licenses and no existing Azure footprint. Help us start this engagement.
cases.context: Financial services, UK-based, GDPR and FCA regulatory requirements, 6-month timeline to MVP

cases.input: We need to migrate our on-premises .NET applications to Azure. We have 15 applications running on Windows Server 2019 with SQL Server. The main driver is cost reduction and the end of Windows Server support.
cases.context: Manufacturing company, 500 employees, existing Azure AD for identity, no cloud experience in the team

cases.input: Our D365 Customer Service implementation from 2019 needs modernization. We want to add omnichannel support, AI-powered case resolution, and integrate with our new IoT platform.
cases.context: Retail company, 50 contact center agents, Teams deployed, existing D365 CE on-premise version

cases.input: We are expanding from the US to the EU and APAC. Our Azure workloads are currently US-only. We need to understand the compliance requirements and how to extend our architecture to support multi-geo.
cases.context: SaaS company, 5000 customers, GDPR for EU customers, data residency requirements per region

cases.input: I want to start an architecture engagement for a healthcare startup building a patient management system. The system will handle PHI and needs to comply with HIPAA. We're a team of 10 engineers.
cases.context: Healthcare startup, US-based, 10 engineers, greenfield project, Azure preferred, HIPAA required
